title: Create REVISION on node update
user_story:
As a webmaster\
I want a copy to be created whenever a user updates a node\
So I am able to restore data when it was accidentally removed or overwritten
description:
* a revision is created whenever a node is updated (not on create, not on get, not on delete)
* the revision is only created for official node types (not internal node types)
* each revision is stored as a separate node (not within the original node)
* each revision gets the node label REVISION (not the label of the original node) → otherwise the revision nodes would appear in all different places
* the revision stores the data as it was BEFORE the node was updated
* the revision is created AFTER the node update was successful
* the original node is not replaced → the revisions are new nodes
* the user is not informed about the creation of the revision, it happens transparently in the background
* the REVISION node stores the following:
  * the data of the original node (all properties that are officially supported at that point in time)
  * mc\_id, created\_at, updated\_at of the original node
  * revision\_mc\_id, revision\_created\_at, revision\_updated\_at
  * original\_node\_label, e.g. `CarModel`
* there is no API endpoint to create revisions, they are only created internally
* revisions are not connected to each other (maybe in the future)
  * the chain of updates can still be determined via `mc_id` + `revision_created_at`
